title: CT3 static tactic graph — External-type compression
description: Concrete static-graph schema for CT3 (External-type compression). It requires the complete 20-node array in fixed source order from CT3.N01 through CT3.N20, with exact node IDs, ordinals, and roles; all remaining graph data must satisfy the generic tactic specification.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for the CT3 (External-type compression) tactic specification; must equal "CT3".

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N01, "Input — boundaried piece X with interface data", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N01".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N01, "Input — boundaried piece X with interface data"; must equal the integer 1.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N01, "Input — boundaried piece X with interface data"; must equal "input", meaning this node records branch-state input that must already be available.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N02, "Definition — external type tau(X)", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N02".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N02, "Definition — external type tau(X)"; must equal the integer 2.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N02, "Definition — external type tau(X)"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N03, "Scope candidate — infinite type index — scope audit", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N03".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N03, "Scope candidate — infinite type index — scope audit"; must equal the integer 3.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N03, "Scope candidate — infinite type index — scope audit"; must equal "scope_audit", meaning this node records a candidate scope obstruction for audit, not as a proved fact.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N04, "Definition — candidate replacement family R(X)", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N04".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N04, "Definition — candidate replacement family R(X)"; must equal the integer 4.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N04, "Definition — candidate replacement family R(X)"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N05, "Lemma — replacement-inclusion test", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N05".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N05, "Lemma — replacement-inclusion test"; must equal the integer 5.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N05, "Lemma — replacement-inclusion test"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N06, "C2 — globally valid replacement", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N06".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N06, "C2 — globally valid replacement"; must equal the integer 6.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N06, "C2 — globally valid replacement"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N07, "Dichotomy lemma — separating context vs.\ indistinguishability", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N07".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N07, "Dichotomy lemma — separating context vs.\ indistinguishability"; must equal the integer 7.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N07, "Dichotomy lemma — separating context vs.\ indistinguishability"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N08, "Routing theorem — which defect payload is certified?", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N08".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N08, "Routing theorem — which defect payload is certified?"; must equal the integer 8.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N08, "Routing theorem — which defect payload is certified?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N09, "C3 — defect account already routed", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N09".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N09, "C3 — defect account already routed"; must equal the integer 9.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N09, "C3 — defect account already routed"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N10, "Payload lemma — build P_3→7 — separating-context defect", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N10".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N10, "Payload lemma — build P_3→7 — separating-context defect"; must equal the integer 10.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N10, "Payload lemma — build P_3→7 — separating-context defect"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N11, "CT 7 — exchange", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N11".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N11, "CT 7 — exchange"; must equal the integer 11.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N11, "CT 7 — exchange"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N12, "Payload lemma — build P_3→12 — load plus measure", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N12".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N12, "Payload lemma — build P_3→12 — load plus measure"; must equal the integer 12.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N12, "Payload lemma — build P_3→12 — load plus measure"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N13, "CT 12 — peeling loop", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N13".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N13, "CT 12 — peeling loop"; must equal the integer 13.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N13, "CT 12 — peeling loop"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N14, "Branch-state definition — unresolved external-type residual", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N14".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N14, "Branch-state definition — unresolved external-type residual"; must equal the integer 14.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N14, "Branch-state definition — unresolved external-type residual"; must equal "definition", meaning this node defines an exact object, predicate, or invariant used later.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N15, "Lemma — type-data persistence", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N15".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N15, "Lemma — type-data persistence"; must equal the integer 15.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N15, "Lemma — type-data persistence"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N16, "Routing theorem — what finite type structure remains?", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N16".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N16, "Routing theorem — what finite type structure remains?"; must equal the integer 16.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N16, "Routing theorem — what finite type structure remains?"; must equal "decision", meaning this node requires an exhaustive and justified branch split.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N17, "Payload lemma — build P_3→8 — repeated-type sequence", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N17".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N17, "Payload lemma — build P_3→8 — repeated-type sequence"; must equal the integer 17.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N17, "Payload lemma — build P_3→8 — repeated-type sequence"; must equal "payload_constructor", meaning this node constructs a typed payload satisfying a consumer trigger.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N18, "Lemma — finite-table certificate", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N18".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N18, "Lemma — finite-table certificate"; must equal the integer 18.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N18, "Lemma — finite-table certificate"; must equal "assertion", meaning this node states a claim that must be proved from the recorded state.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N19, "CT 8 — pumping", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N19".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N19, "CT 8 — pumping"; must equal the integer 19.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N19, "CT 8 — pumping"; must equal "consumer_handoff", meaning this node hands a declared typed payload to another tactic.

nodeId.description: Required stable ID for CT3.N20, "C5 — finite type table closes", in CT3 (External-type compression); must equal "CT3.N20".

nodeNumber.description: Required one-based source ordinal for CT3.N20, "C5 — finite type table closes"; must equal the integer 20.

nodeType.description: Required role for CT3.N20, "C5 — finite type table closes"; must equal "certificate", meaning this node is a terminal closure or contradiction certificate.

nodes.description: Required complete node specification for CT3 (External-type compression); must contain exactly 20 generic node objects in source order from CT3.N01 through CT3.N20, with the fixed identity, ordinal, and role declared at each position.
